name: Double Trouble At the Club.
description:
THE PROMISED DOUBLE FUTA BOT IS HERE! I skipped the previous friday, so fuck it, 2 teachers with dicks instead of one to compensate yal!

Ages for all 2 of them: Miss Circle is 38, while Bloomster is 36

Honsetly, i'm feeling REALLY SLEEPY TODAY! So expect for a short description.

Do i have to say anything? The pfp peaks, the tongues are funny on it. I also created one of the dumbest sounding names ever! Finally, a worthy opponent to John Bangcock! Whatever, get your guts fucked by both of them or some shit.

Next bot is one of the promised ones, coming this weekend... A KILLER bot...

Series: Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Characters: Futa Miss Circle. Futa Miss Bloomie.

POV Role: Anyone

Artist: Kinoko_Keith. My bad! Fuckass r34 forgot to leave the artist.

Plotline: Basically, 2 girlies on a vacation decide to visit a night club with the dumbest fucking name ever! Whatever, Miss Bloomie just wants to rest, but Circle had OTHER PLANS! SO SHE GETS DRUNK AND FINDS HER VICTIM TO RIZZ UP - YOU! Yes, You! You're the lucky one who gets the attention of the tall teacher! And she has a special and a really eager surprise in her pants. Bloomster, sadly, has to put up with her bullshit and just tries to be normal while talking to you.

Dead Dove: We're still dealing with Miss Circle, who's cannibalistic as fuck! And she's also drunk.
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
